title: Testosterone Crisis: Young Men's Levels Plummet
description: Population-level testosterone decline in young men is now documented across five decades and over a million subjects — and the causes aren't aging or obesity alone. Phthalates in plastics, PFAS compounds, sleep deprivation, chronic stress, and sedentary behavior are disrupting the hormonal machinery at the source. Meanwhile, a multi-billion-dollar TRT industry has every incentive to treat the symptom and ignore the cause.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Testosterone Crisis: Young Men's Levels Plummet
